passives.name: Scarlet Allegiance
passives.effects: If your {{stil|life steal}} and {{stil|omnivamp}} sum to at least 30%, gain {{as|500 '''bonus''' health}} and {{tip|heal}} yourself equal to 10% of the damage that enemy champions within {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 525 units of you take from all sources.

effects_structured.raw: If your {{stil life steal}} and {{stil omnivamp}} sum to at least 30%, gain {{as 500 '''bonus''' health}} and {{tip heal}} yourself equal to 10% of the damage that enemy champions within {{tip cr icononly=true}} 525 units of you take from all sources.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Scarlet Allegiance checks the sum of life steal and omnivamp against a 30% threshold and activates when the combined value meets or exceeds that threshold.
Player-visible behavior: when active, the user gains bonus health and receives healing based on nearby enemy champion damage intake from all sources within 525 units.
Threshold behavior is additive across life steal and omnivamp; either source may be zero if the combined threshold is met.
